pi_items.source: task.json description field: 'Username "achen"' and setup_task.sh: 'Add a new user "Alexandra Chen" (achen)' and verifier.py checks for login='achen'
task.json description field: 'Email "alexandra.chen@company.com"' and setup_task.sh confirms this is the expected email for the test user

privileged_info_summary: The task is to add a new user to Eramba (an open-source GRC platform) with username 'achen', first name 'Alexandra', last name 'Chen', and email 'alexandra.chen@company.com'. The verifier checks Eramba's MySQL database for user presence by querying users table with login='achen' or matching the name 'Alexandra Chen'. Eramba is real software verified via official website (eramba.org) and established with 14k+ community installations. All test data is synthetic - created specifically for this task with a generic 'company.com' email domain.
